finding: Unicode identifier admission data must be treated as one authenticated, exact-version bundle. Exact URLs, same-version headers, SHA-256 verification, redirect rejection, and cross-file consistency are independent admission conditions; HTTPS or a mutable latest alias is insufficient.

primary_sources.observed: Header identifies DerivedCoreProperties-17.0.0 and a 2025-07-30 data date.

primary_sources.use: Defines the security-data context for confusables and identifier status.

uncertainty: The complete Unicode 17.0.0 files were not downloaded and exhaustively processed in this run.
Expected digests still require an independently authenticated distribution channel.
Bundle authentication does not establish that an identifier is safe or non-malicious.
falsification_route: Supply a canonical exact-version file whose verified digest and version header pass independently but which this loader rejects, or demonstrate acceptance of a redirected, digest-mismatched, mutable-alias, or cross-version bundle.
